children.name: Unit | Jest Lane Configs
keeps the unit lane fast and coverage-free
excludes Redis-suffixed specs from the general integration lane
targets every Redis-suffixed spec in the redis lane
extends the timeout for the script/git integration lane
composes every tier and enforces the gate in the coverage lane
composes every tier without reporters in the compatibility lane
composes every tier and emits JUnit in the CI lane
keeps production coverage scoped away from test helpers
ratchets the QE critical runtime, provider, deploy, promotion, and Postman files
fails a critical-file coverage drop even when global coverage passes
composes every tier without JUnit or coverage in the reporting lane
keeps package scripts mapped to explicit Jest lane configs
keeps CI topology split into fast unit matrix and canonical full gates
pins the Node toolchain in .nvmrc and defaults the setup composite to it
path-gates the expensive local provider integration workflow
keeps CodeQL required while allowing docs-only changes to use the lightweight docs gate
documents local Redis integration discovery through the pinned Docker profile
uses UUID-style Redis key prefixes instead of wall-clock prefixes

defaults empty values to false
accepts true and false
rejects unsupported values

uses postman:post-deploy as the canonical npm command

pins release validation workflows to Hugging Face, OpenAI, and Together
